name: Metro Mining Limited
description: Metro Mining Limited (ASX: MMI) is an Australian mining and exploration company headquartered in Brisbane, Queensland. The company's primary asset is the Bauxite Hills Mine, located on Western Cape York, which has been in operation since 2018. As a premier bauxite supplier, Metro Mining focuses on extracting and shipping high-quality bauxite to meet the growing demands of the aluminium industry in China. In addition to its flagship mining operations, the company maintains a significant portfolio of exploration projects across the Cape York region, committed to sustainable mining practices and community engagement.
